heading: Political activities
label: 21706 Political activities
text: The corporation shall be nonpolitical and may not promote the candidacy of an individual seeking public office.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2170636:46., .Sept. 16, 1919, ch. 59, § 641 Stat. 285The words “as an organization” are omitted as unnecessary.
